intro: Between April 12 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published 20 reports on data breaches, the vast majority of which were assessed as high severity. The threat landscape during this period was defined by activity from ShinyHunters, RansomHub, and Rhysida. These incidents primarily targeted organizations within the government, hospitality, retail, technology, and travel sectors. Geographically, the affected entities were concentrated in Europe, the United States, and North America, with other significant events impacting Mexico and having a global reach.
